{{Quote|You appear to have decided I'm an idiot.|[[Darth Caedus]], to Admiral Ratobo|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>}}
'''Ratobo''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]] and the new commander of the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. He commanded forces at the [[Second Battle of Balmorra]], where he met his [[Death/Legends|death]].

{{Char-stub}}
